name: Sunshine Orange, Onion and Avocado Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. For salad base, wash and dry romaine and arugula or watercress. Tear into bite-sized pieces and place on each of 4 serving plates. Refrigerate while preparing dressing.
2. Peel oranges and remove as much white pith as possible. Slice thinly, then half. Place orange slices in a bowl.
3. Slice onion very thin and add to the bowl with oranges. Add chopped parsley and gently toss to combine.
4. Slice avocado separately; do not toss with onions and oranges.
5. Arrange orange slices, onion slices, and sliced avocado on plates in a decorative design.
6. For dressing, combine olive oil, red wine vinegar, orange juice, and black pepper in a small bowl. Whisk well.
7. Pour dressing over salad and serve immediately.
